name: avoidance
description: 躲避掉落物。左右移动避开从天而降的红色障碍，坚持越久分越高。
dsl: create object name=Player type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#4488FF width=32 height=32 scene=Game
create object name=Obstacle type=ShapePainter shape=circle color=#DC3232 width=24 height=24 scene=Game
create object name=ScoreText type=Text scene=Game size=24
set variable name=Score value=0 type=Number scope=global
on key Left -> move Player to 350,550
on key Right -> move Player to 450,550
